problems.text: A gardener plants 5 roses, 10 hibiscus, 6 lavender, and 8 hydrangea bushes. How many bushes did she plant in total?

In a hotel, the first thing you see are the FIFA World Cup flags. The owner says that this year he has 5 more blue flags than last year. If last year there were 6 blue flags, how many blue flags are there this year?
Which square should go in place of the question mark?
What number goes in the square with the question mark?
Mia is building a Lego set that has 30 pieces. They can be red, yellow, or blue. If there are 11 red and 9 yellow pieces, how many pieces are blue?
